subcodes.first_line: The Book hath been sent down by the Sovereign of Utterance, that haply the peoples of existence may draw nigh unto God, the One, the All-Informed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله مالک البیان لعل اهل الامکان یتقربون الی الله الفرد الخبیر
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @chastisement and requital, @power of the Manifestation of God, @praise and encouragement, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
